---
title: "AI Cyber Security Design"
description: "Animated architecture diagrams across AI infrastructure, AI security, data platforms, and how modern AI systems really work — end to end."
page-layout: full
toc: false
lightbox: false
include-in-header:
  - text: |
      <style>
        .acsd-intro { max-width: 60rem; margin: 0 auto 1.75rem; }
        .acsd-collage {
          display: grid;
          grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
          gap: 14px;
          margin: 0 auto 2.5rem;
        }
        .acsd-tile {
          position: relative;
          display: block;
          border-radius: 16px;
          overflow: hidden;
          background: #fff;
          border: 1px solid rgba(76,74,152,0.16);
          box-shadow: 0 2px 10px rgba(30,30,60,0.06);
          transition: transform .18s ease, box-shadow .18s ease;
        }
        .acsd-tile:hover {
          transform: translateY(-4px);
          box-shadow: 0 12px 30px rgba(76,74,152,0.22);
        }
        .acsd-tile img {
          width: 100%;
          aspect-ratio: 4 / 3;
          object-fit: cover;
          display: block;
        }
        .acsd-cap {
          position: absolute;
          left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0;
          padding: 1.4rem .95rem .7rem;
          background: linear-gradient(transparent, rgba(20,18,40,0.78));
          color: #fff;
          opacity: 0;
          transition: opacity .18s ease;
        }
        .acsd-tile:hover .acsd-cap { opacity: 1; }
        .acsd-cap b { font-size: .98rem; font-weight: 700; display: block; }
        .acsd-cap span { font-size: .8rem; opacity: .9; }
        @media (max-width: 820px) {
          .acsd-collage { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 12px; }
        }
      </style>
---

::: {.acsd-intro}
A collection of **animated architecture diagrams** — each a single, detailed picture of how a real AI or security system fits together, from raw input to final output. Tap any tile to open it full-size.
:::

```{=html}
<div class="acsd-collage">

  <a class="acsd-tile" href="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/01-agentic-rag-platform.gif" target="_blank">
    <img src="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/01-agentic-rag-platform.gif" alt="Agentic RAG Platform" loading="lazy">
    <div class="acsd-cap"><b>Agentic RAG Platform</b><span>Plan, search, call tools, ground the answer.</span></div>
  </a>

  <a class="acsd-tile" href="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/02-llm-finetuning-pipeline.gif" target="_blank">
    <img src="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/02-llm-finetuning-pipeline.gif" alt="LLM Fine-tuning Pipeline" loading="lazy">
    <div class="acsd-cap"><b>LLM Fine-tuning Pipeline</b><span>Data → LoRA/QLoRA → eval → registry → ship.</span></div>
  </a>

  <a class="acsd-tile" href="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/03-ai-evals-observability.gif" target="_blank">
    <img src="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/03-ai-evals-observability.gif" alt="AI Evals & Observability" loading="lazy">
    <div class="acsd-cap"><b>AI Evals & Observability</b><span>Log, score, trace the why, catch drift early.</span></div>
  </a>

  <a class="acsd-tile" href="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/04-multi-agent-orchestration.gif" target="_blank">
    <img src="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/04-multi-agent-orchestration.gif" alt="Multi-Agent Orchestration" loading="lazy">
    <div class="acsd-cap"><b>Multi-Agent Orchestration</b><span>A supervisor routes specialist agents over a bus.</span></div>
  </a>

  <a class="acsd-tile" href="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/05-voice-ai-pipeline.gif" target="_blank">
    <img src="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/05-voice-ai-pipeline.gif" alt="Voice AI Pipeline" loading="lazy">
    <div class="acsd-cap"><b>Voice AI Pipeline</b><span>Speech → LLM → speech, streamed in under a second.</span></div>
  </a>

  <a class="acsd-tile" href="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/06-securing-llm-stack.gif" target="_blank">
    <img src="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/06-securing-llm-stack.gif" alt="Securing the LLM App Stack" loading="lazy">
    <div class="acsd-cap"><b>Securing the LLM App Stack</b><span>OWASP Top 10 for LLMs, mapped to every layer.</span></div>
  </a>

  <a class="acsd-tile" href="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/07-ai-red-teaming-platform.gif" target="_blank">
    <img src="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/07-ai-red-teaming-platform.gif" alt="AI Red Teaming Platform" loading="lazy">
    <div class="acsd-cap"><b>AI Red Teaming Platform</b><span>Adversarial prompts at scale → back to guardrails.</span></div>
  </a>

  <a class="acsd-tile" href="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/08-ai-soc-platform.gif" target="_blank">
    <img src="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/08-ai-soc-platform.gif" alt="AI-Powered SOC" loading="lazy">
    <div class="acsd-cap"><b>AI-Powered SOC</b><span>ML triage + an agent that maps to MITRE ATT&CK.</span></div>
  </a>

  <a class="acsd-tile" href="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/09-shadow-ai-dlp.gif" target="_blank">
    <img src="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/09-shadow-ai-dlp.gif" alt="Shadow AI / DLP" loading="lazy">
    <div class="acsd-cap"><b>Shadow AI / DLP</b><span>Discover AI tools, inspect data, redact secrets.</span></div>
  </a>

  <a class="acsd-tile" href="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/10-zero-trust-ai-agents.gif" target="_blank">
    <img src="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/10-zero-trust-ai-agents.gif" alt="Zero Trust for AI Agents" loading="lazy">
    <div class="acsd-cap"><b>Zero Trust for AI Agents</b><span>SPIFFE identity, OPA policy, Vault, least privilege.</span></div>
  </a>

  <a class="acsd-tile" href="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/11-modern-data-platform.gif" target="_blank">
    <img src="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/11-modern-data-platform.gif" alt="Modern Data Platform for AI" loading="lazy">
    <div class="acsd-cap"><b>Modern Data Platform for AI</b><span>Ingest → lake → transform → govern → serve.</span></div>
  </a>

  <a class="acsd-tile" href="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/12-realtime-ml-fraud.gif" target="_blank">
    <img src="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/12-realtime-ml-fraud.gif" alt="Realtime ML / Fraud Detection" loading="lazy">
    <div class="acsd-cap"><b>Realtime ML / Fraud Detection</b><span>Stream → features → score in ms → approve/block.</span></div>
  </a>

  <a class="acsd-tile" href="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/13-mlops-cicd.gif" target="_blank">
    <img src="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/13-mlops-cicd.gif" alt="MLOps CI/CD for Models" loading="lazy">
    <div class="acsd-cap"><b>MLOps CI/CD for Models</b><span>Push → eval gates → canary → promote or rollback.</span></div>
  </a>

  <a class="acsd-tile" href="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/14-chatgpt-request-journey.gif" target="_blank">
    <img src="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/14-chatgpt-request-journey.gif" alt="What Happens When You Ask ChatGPT" loading="lazy">
    <div class="acsd-cap"><b>What Happens When You Ask ChatGPT</b><span>Edge → router → GPU prefill/decode → stream back.</span></div>
  </a>

  <a class="acsd-tile" href="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/15-frontier-training-run.gif" target="_blank">
    <img src="ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/15-frontier-training-run.gif" alt="Inside a Frontier Training Run" loading="lazy">
    <div class="acsd-cap"><b>Inside a Frontier Training Run</b><span>Web data → pretrain → eval gates → post-train → release.</span></div>
  </a>

</div>
```

::: {.acsd-intro}
*Made by Kader Mohideen — AI × CyberSecurity. Follow along on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/kader-m-1a6023a6/).*
:::
